targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(tici_grpc_handle_duration_bucket{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"}[1m])) by (le, type))
sum by (type, result) (rate(tici_grpc_handle_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"}[1m]))
sum by (service, type) (tici_grpc_handle_inflight{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"})

sum(rate(tici_meta_client_grpc_handle_duration_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type) / sum(rate(tici_meta_client_grpc_handle_duration_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (type)

sum(rate(tici_dedup_stage_latency_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (stage) / sum(rate(tici_dedup_stage_latency_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[1m])) by (stage)

panels.description: Backend storage request duration by backend and operation type

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(tici_storage_handle_duration_bucket{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"}[1m])) by (le, backend, type))

sum(rate(tici_storage_handle_duration_sum{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"}[1m])) by (backend, type) / sum(rate(tici_storage_handle_duration_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"}[1m])) by (backend, type)

panels.title: Storage Handle Duration

panels.description: Backend storage request rate by backend, operation type, and result

targets.expr: sum by (backend, type, result) (rate(tici_storage_handle_count{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"}[1m]))

panels.title: Storage Handle Count

panels.description: Inflight backend storage requests by backend and operation type

targets.expr: sum by (backend, type) (tici_storage_handle_inflight{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", instance=~"$instance", service="reader"})

panels.title: Storage Handle Inflight

list.label: Instance
list.name: instance
list.query: query_result(max by (instance) (up{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", component=~".*tiflash"} or up{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", job=~".*tiflash.*"} or up{k8s_cluster="$k8s_cluster", tidb_cluster="$tidb_cluster", job="tiflash"}))
